div.p: 🎉 Done! Import completed, converted to code. You can now start prompting to add more features or improve the code.

ul.li: Modern React-based landing page showcasing Divvy's AI bill splitting capabilities
Implemented hero section with gradient backgrounds and compelling value propositions
Built comprehensive statistics display featuring user engagement metrics
Created detailed feature showcase highlighting AI-powered smart scanning technology
Designed step-by-step process explanation for user onboarding
Integrated community newsletter signup with modern form design
Developed responsive footer with comprehensive product links and contact information
Applied consistent design system with Tailwind CSS and component-based architecture

body.title: Build Full Apps from Plain Text- No Coding Required. Rocket.new

meta.name: description
meta.content: Turn ideas into production-ready apps with backend, integrations in minutes and deploy instantly. Rocket builds full-stack web and mobile apps from natural language.
Rocket | Think, Type, and Launch Real Apps with AI
Rocket is your AI-powered superpower. Build complete, production-ready apps from plain English- faster than ever before.
Preview of the Rocket AI app builder interface
